title: Residents of Spanish Towns Caught in Fierce Blazes Recount Harrowing Escapes
summary_full: Many say communication was chaotic and even nonexistent as flames tore through the area, taking 12 lives in one of the deadliest wildfires on record in Spain.
summary_public: Many say communication was chaotic and even nonexistent as flames tore through the area, taking 12 lives in one of the deadliest wildfires on record in Spain.
